title: nodejs:20 bug fix and enhancement update
overview: An update for Oracle Linux is now available for Oracle Linux 9.
description:
nodejs
[1:20.19.5-1]
- Update to version 20.19.5
  Resolves: RHEL-114749

nodejs-nodemon
[3.0.1-1]
- Rebase to 3.0.1
- Resolves: CVE-2022-25883

nodejs-packaging
[2021.06-5]
- nodejs.req to properly detect bundled deps
